seoTitle: Truro vs Tumby Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Truro and Tumby Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Truro vs Tumby Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Truro and Tumby Bay.
heading: Truro vs Tumby Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Truro, South Australia and Tumby Bay, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Truro has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Tumby Bay (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Truro or Tumby Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Truro has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Tumby Bay scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Truro scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Tumby Bay scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Truro or Tumby Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Truro has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
